fields.label: Wave Fill (colour of section below)
fields.description: Set this to the colour scheme of the next section to avoid a white gap.

fields.name: videoIframe
fields.label: Video Iframe URL (demo only — overrides right-side image)
fields.description: Path to an HTML file served from /public, e.g. /homepage-video/index.html. Temporary staging slot; will be replaced by a native <video> once the final MP4 is rendered.

fields.label: TL;DR Verdict
fields.description: 40-80 word direct verdict for GEO.

fields.description: One value per column, in the same order as Column Headers.

fields.name: limit
fields.label: Max Pages

fields.description: Manually specify tags to filter by. Leave empty to use the page's own tags.

defaultItem.heading: The Buyer's Guide to Functional Assessment
defaultItem.promoBody: A 24-page comprehensive resource for evaluating, procuring, and implementing objective functional measurement in community care.

fields.name: title
fields.label: Page Title
fields.description: Browser tab + Google title. Aim for ~60 chars.

fields.name: description
fields.label: Meta Description
fields.description: Google snippet. 140-160 chars.

fields.name: h1
fields.label: H1 Override
fields.description: Override the hero headline as H1 if needed.

fields.name: tags
fields.label: Content Tags
fields.description: Tags for cross-referencing content across the site. Use slugs from the tag taxonomy: topic (falls-prevention, grip-strength, etc.), segment (home-care, senior-living, etc.), solution (able-assess, etc.), type (guide, evidence, etc.).
